enrichment.summary: Kyle does a casual life-update vlog from Boulder at age 20-something in 2014, prompted by a fan request. He covers recent events including buying a new MacBook Pro with his mom's help, getting part-time jobs as a janitor and soon as a snow shoveler, finding a rabid bat in his house, buying a motorcycle, and his ongoing work on his personal website. He reflects extensively on weed legalization in Colorado, audiobooks paired with labor jobs, frugal living, and his long-term plans for his website and YouTube videos.
enrichment.speaker: kyle

stances.position: strongly pro-legalization; smokes heavily and sees weed as enhancing creativity and website ambition
labor jobs are ideal for audiobooks and can be used to self-educate out of lower economic classes
society should offer more jobs in one-hour increments for people who struggle with traditional full-time work
websites are primarily for organizing your own brain, not just for others; everything should be visible, never hidden in dropdowns
Ignatius Donnelly's Atlantis book is a slam dunk; ancient world mythologies are all the same story and deserve a well-organized webpage
not currently a priority because he's too focused on his website; doesn't care enough to make them right now
canceled it since biking to work and physical jobs provide sufficient exercise
